channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Middle East latest: 2 freed hostages are back in Israel
item.description: Hamas released two hostages in the southern Gaza Strip on Saturday as part of its ceasefire deal with Israel, while Palestinian authorities say Israel has agreed to release dozens of prisoners in the fourth round of exchanges during the Gaza ceasefire deal between Israel and Hamas.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: ICE agents raid seafood store, detain U.S. military veteran
item.description: "I asked them [the agents] what documentation they were looking for, and they said it was a license or a passport.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, KTLA 5

item.title: Settlement reached in lawsuit involving HGTV stars' companies: court records
item.description: A settlement has been reached in the lawsuit involving an Arkansas-based couple and stars of HGTV's "Fixer to Fabulous" just days before the parties were set to go to trial.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KTLA 5

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet transporting a child who had just completed treatment for a life-threatening condition, her mother and four others crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Democrats to elect new leader as party struggles to repair brand
item.description: OXON HILL, Md. (AP) — Democrats, desperately seeking a new message and messengers to push back against the Trump administration, will elect a new leader Saturday in a low-profile Democratic National Committee election that could have big implications for the party's future.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A deadly flight out of Wichita has one of America's most historic aviation cities reeling
item.description: A deadly collision between a passenger airliner and an Army helicopter left Kansas’ largest city grieving.
item.dc:creator: John Hanna And Heather Hollingsworth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Colleges around the US cautiously navigate Trump's DEI crackdown
item.description: Around the United States, colleges and universities are cautiously navigating the Trump administration's crackdown on diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Maryclaire Dale, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Things to know about how Trump's policies target transgender people
item.description: President Donald Trump has targeted the rights of transgender people in executive orders in his first two weeks back in office.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Mulvihill, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: An air ambulance has crashed in Philadelphia. What to know about air medical transport
item.description: A medical transport jet carrying a child patient, her mother and four others slammed into a Philadelphia neighborhood and exploded in flames.
item.dc:creator: AUDREY McAVOY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A medical plane carrying a child patient and 5 others crashes in Philadelphia, setting homes ablaze
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A medical transport jet with a child patient, her mother and four others aboard crashed into a Philadelphia neighborhood shortly after takeoff Friday evening, exploding in a fireball that engulfed several homes.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and MATT ROURKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rihanna attends the trial of her partner, rapper A$AP Rocky, who is accused in a 2021 shooting
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — In a stretch of questioning crucial to the defense of A$AP Rocky, his lawyer on Friday challenged the account of his accuser, who said he suffered a hand injury when the hip-hop performer fired a gun at him in 2021.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: South Carolina puts inmate Marion Bowman Jr. to death in state’s third execution since September
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina put a third inmate to death in four months Friday as it goes through a backlog of prisoners who exhausted their appeals while the state couldn’t find lethal injection drugs. Marion Bowman Jr. was executed at 6:27 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: VIDEO: Doorbell camera captures fiery plane crash in Philadelphia
item.description: Doorbell camera footage from a nearby residence captured the moment a medical transport jet plummeted to the ground in Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Rains, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Senate Democrats call for reinstatement of IGs fired by Trump
item.description: The lawmakers said that Congress did not receive the 30-day notice or the reason for the IG’s removals which took place at over a dozen agencies.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: VIDEO: 525-pound bear found hiding under evacuated home after Southern California fire
item.description: Wildlife officials rescued a 525-pound bear found hiding underneath a home that was evacuated during the Eaton Fire.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, KRON4

item.title: Man agrees to plead guilty for flying drone that damaged firefighting aircraft in LA wildfire
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The pilot of a drone that crashed into a firefighting plane, leaving a gaping hole and grounding the aircraft during the deadly Palisades Fire in Los Angeles, has agreed to plead guilty to a misdemeanor count of unsafely operating a drone, federal authorities said Friday.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: A list of government web pages that have gone dark to comply with Trump orders
item.description: A number of U.S. government web pages changed or went dark Friday as agencies scrambled to comply with President Donald Trump's executive orders declaring his administration would recognize only two genders and ordering an end to diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Medical plane carrying pediatric patient crashes in Philadelphia, sets homes ablaze
item.description: A medical transport jet headed for Missouri and carrying two people and four crew members crashed in Northeast Philadelphia Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, KRON4

item.title: CBS agrees to hand over '60 Minutes' Harris interview transcripts to FCC
item.description: CBS says it will turn over an unedited transcript of its October interview with Kamala Harris to the Federal Communications Commission, part of President Donald Trump's ongoing fight with the network over how it handled a story about his opponent.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: What is known about the fatal crash of a plane and Army chopper
item.description: American Airlines Flight 5342 hit an Army helicopter near Washington D.C.'s Reagan National Wednesday night, sending the two aircraft into the Potomac River and killing all 67 aboard in the deadliest U.S. air crash in more than two decades. The crash around 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What to know about the NTSB, the agency investigating the DC plane crash
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A collision between an American Airlines passenger jet and an Army helicopter near Washington, D.C., that killed 67 people brought renewed focus on the federal agency charged with investigating aviation disasters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: DC plane crash: Potomac River divers' search for bodies complicated by conditions out of their control
item.description: After an Army helicopter and American Airlines plane crashed into the Potomac River around Washington, D.C., a Virginia diver shared challenges of such a recovery effort.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Soldiers in deadly helicopter crash with DC plane identified
item.description: The U.S. Army has identified two of the three soldiers who were killed Wednesday night when their helicopter crashed into an airplane in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tour guide at former Colorado gold mine fell out of elevator after apparently not latching door
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A tour guide killed at a former Colorado gold mine last year fell out of a crowded elevator taking tourists below ground after apparently not latching its door closed, documents obtained by The Associated Press show.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN SLEVIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Delphi murders: Convicted killer in hiking trail slayings cites new evidence in bid to overturn conviction
item.description: Delphi murders suspect Richard Allen, found guilty of brutally murdering two teen girls on an Indiana hiking trail in 2017, is asking a Carroll County court to overturn his conviction.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump vows sweeping tariffs on oil, pharmaceuticals and semiconductors
item.description: President Trump on Friday vowed to impose sweeping tariffs on semiconductor chips, pharmaceuticals, steel and aluminum and oil and gas.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Midair collision kills 67 people in the deadliest US air disaster in almost a quarter century
item.description: ARLINGTON, Va. (AP) — A midair collision between an Army helicopter and a jetliner killed all 67 people aboard the two aircraft, officials said Thursday, as they scrutinized the actions of the military pilot in the country's deadliest aviation disaster in almost a quarter century.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, TARA COPP, ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and LEA SKENE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
